groups_no_group.message: Select a group or create one to start.

groups_delete_confirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

settings_next_cursor_desc.message: Set the hotkey to jump to the next placeholder after replacement.

settings_add_snippet_desc.message: Set the hotkey to quickly add a new snippet in the editor.

settings_toggle_fold_desc.message: Collapse or expand the details of the currently selected snippet.

settings_particles_desc.message: Show particles and wave effects when a snippet is replaced.

settings_reset_confirm.message: This will wipe all your snippets and settings. Are you sure?

guide_items_cursor_desc.message: Set the tab order for moving the cursor after replacement.

guide_items_dynamic_cursor_desc.message: Use expressions to set the cursor order dynamically.

guide_items_date_desc.message: Inserts the current date and time.

guide_items_url_desc.message: Inserts address, domain, or title of the current tab.

guide_items_clipboard_desc.message: Asynchronously fetches and inserts clipboard text.

guide_items_prompt_desc.message: Shows a popup for user input and inserts the value.

guide_items_choice_desc.message: Displays a menu to select one of several options. Can also be selected with numeric keys (1-9).

guide_items_prompt_tip_desc.message: Variables or formulas can be used in prompt messages.

guide_items_uuid_desc.message: Generates and inserts a random UUID v4.

guide_items_random_range_desc.message: Generates a random integer between a and b.

guide_items_random_list_desc.message: Randomly selects one of the comma-separated arguments.

guide_items_len_desc.message: Returns the length of the string.

guide_items_replace_desc.message: Replaces specific text within a string with other text.

guide_items_trim_desc.message: Removes all leading and trailing whitespace from a string.

guide_items_substr_desc.message: Cuts the string to the desired length from a specified position.

guide_items_str_desc.message: Forcefully converts a value to a string.

guide_items_num_desc.message: Converts a value to a numeric type (including decimals).

guide_items_int_desc.message: Converts a value to an integer type (truncates decimals).

guide_items_min_max_desc.message: Returns the minimum or maximum among given values.

guide_items_capture_desc.message: Captures variables from the trigger (flags supported).

guide_items_variable_desc.message: Use captured variables in the body (highlighted).

guide_items_if_desc.message: Shows text according to the condition.

guide_items_switch_desc.message: Compares an expression result with multiple values.

guide_items_case_desc.message: Comparison block. Multiple values can be specified.

guide_items_for_desc.message: Repeats content for a specified number of times.

guide_items_set_desc.message: Declares a variable and stores the calculation result.

guide_items_scope_tip_desc.message: Variables declared outside can be modified inside if, for, and switch blocks. However, variables first defined inside a block disappear when the block ends.

guide_items_backspace_desc.message: Performs a backspace action to delete the previous character.

guide_items_line_cont_desc.message: Adding \ at the end of a line removes the newline and the following line's indentation.

default_snippet_replacement.message:
Hello, {{cursor}}!
I'm here to guide you about {{cursor}} today.

app_description.message: Intelligent text expansion tool with powerful syntax and dynamic features.
